source: International Standard Bible Encyclopaedia (James Orr ed., 1915)
html:
bo'-rith: Mentioned in the genealogical table which traces the descent of Esdras (Ezra) from Aaron (2 Esdras 1:2). In 1 Esdras 8:2, his name appears as BOCCAS (which see), and in 1Ch 6:5,51; Ezr 7:4, BUKKI (which see).
